finding_description: No local exhaust ventilation (LEV) system installed at welding stations 3 and 4; welding fume exposure risk to operators
recommendation: Install LEV with filtration at all welding stations; interim: provide P100 respirators and limit continuous welding to 2 hours

finding_description: 5 out of 12 electrical panels missing arc flash hazard labels; no arc flash risk assessment documented
recommendation: Conduct arc flash risk assessment for all panels; install arc flash warning labels with incident energy levels and required PPE; restrict panel access to qualified persons only

finding_description: MSDS/SDS sheets not available at point of use for 4 chemicals; chemical compatibility not considered in storage arrangement — oxidizers stored adjacent to flammables
recommendation: Immediately reorganize chemical storage per compatibility chart; laminated SDS sheets at every chemical station; chemical handling training for all stores personnel

finding_description: Annual load testing certificates expired for 2 out of 5 overhead cranes (Crane #3 and #5); cranes still in operation
recommendation: Immediately take Crane #3 and #5 out of service; arrange third-party load testing within 7 days; no crane to operate without valid load test certificate

finding_description: Emergency assembly point signage faded at 3 out of 5 assembly points; last full-scale emergency drill was 14 months ago (policy requires annually)
recommendation: Replace faded signage within 1 week; conduct full-scale emergency drill within 30 days; establish quarterly drill schedule for remainder of 2026

finding_description: Boiler room ventilation — ambient temperature measured at 48°C at operator station; exceeds recommended 40°C limit for continuous work; heat stress risk during summer months
recommendation: Install additional roof ventilation fans; provide cooled rest area within 30m; implement wet-bulb globe temperature (WBGT) monitoring during Mar-Jun; mandatory hydration schedule for boiler operators

finding_description: Racking system in stores area showing visible deflection on 2 bays (Bay 7 and Bay 12); maximum load capacity signs not displayed on any racking
recommendation: Immediately reduce load on Bay 7 and 12 to 50% until structural assessment completed; display load capacity signs on ALL racking bays; annual racking inspection by structural engineer

finding_description: Random PPE compliance check: 78% compliance overall (target 95%); main gaps in safety glasses (65%) and hearing protection in high-noise areas (72%)
recommendation: Reinforce PPE policy through toolbox talks; install PPE dispensers at entry to mandatory zones; implement PPE compliance monitoring through supervisors with weekly reporting; recognize 100% compliance teams
